faq.can_exchanges_integrate_hobc.answer: See the official Exchange Listing Packet for network parameters, supply, checksums, and listing contact details. No listing is guaranteed.
faq.can_i_mine_with_a_small_miner.answer: Yes, small SHA256 miners can try the Nano Pool. Nano miners, Bitaxe-style devices, NerdMiner-style hobby miners, and other low-hashrate setups may submit fewer shares and show jumpy hashrate.
faq.can_i_mine_with_a_small_miner.questi: Can I mine with a small miner?
faq.can_i_run_my_own_pool.answer: Technically advanced users may run mining infrastructure, but official third-party pool setup documentation is To be confirmed.
faq.can_i_run_my_own_pool.question: Can I run my own pool?
faq.can_i_solo_mine.answer: The current site describes the pools as solo only. Accepted shares show work, but payout depends on finding a real block under pool rules.
faq.can_i_solo_mine.question: Can I solo mine?
faq.does_a_high_share_mean_i_found_a_blo: Not always. A share only finds a block if it meets or beats the current network difficulty target.
Does a high share mean I found a block?
faq.is_mining_profitable.answer: Profit depends on hardware, power cost, uptime, difficulty, luck, and market conditions. HOBC docs do not promise profit.
faq.is_mining_profitable.question: Is mining profitable?
faq.should_i_open_rpc.answer: No. Keep RPC private/local only. Mainnet RPC is 18762 and should not be exposed to the internet.
faq.should_i_open_rpc.question: Should I open RPC?
faq.text.answer: Use the official contact form and choose the section that matches your issue.
faq.what_algorithm_does_it_use.question: What algorithm does it use?
faq.what_are_accepted_shares.answer: Accepted shares are valid units of mining work accepted by the pool.
faq.what_are_accepted_shares.question: What are accepted shares?
faq.what_are_checksums.answer: Checksums are hashes published for download files so users can verify that a file matches the official release.
faq.what_are_checksums.question: What are checksums?
faq.what_are_rejected_shares.answer: Rejected shares were not accepted by the pool. Common causes include stale work, wrong URL, wrong port, bad worker format, latency, or firmware issues.
faq.what_are_rejected_shares.question: What are rejected shares?
faq.what_happens_if_i_lose_my_wallet_bac: If you lose the wallet backup or password needed to spend funds, coins can become permanently inaccessible.
What happens if I lose my wallet backup?
faq.what_is_a_bootstrap_snapshot.answer: A bootstrap snapshot is a packaged copy of chain data used to speed initial sync. Official HOBC bootstrap snapshot status is Coming soon.
faq.what_is_a_full_node.answer: A full node verifies blocks and transactions independently and helps relay chain data to peers.
faq.what_is_a_full_node.question: What is a full node?
faq.what_is_best_difficulty.answer: Best difficulty is the highest-difficulty share seen for a miner or pool over a period.
faq.what_is_best_difficulty.question: What is best difficulty?
faq.what_is_cold_storage.answer: Cold storage means keeping wallet keys offline so they are not exposed to an internet-connected machine during normal use.
faq.what_is_cold_storage.question: What is cold storage?
faq.what_is_hobbyhash_coin.answer: HobbyHash Coin is a SHA256 coin focused on hobby miners, home miners, solo miners, and small mining setups.
faq.what_is_hobbyhash_coin.question: What is HobbyHash Coin?
faq.what_is_hobc.answer: HOBC is the ticker for HobbyHash Coin.
faq.what_is_hobc.question: What is HOBC?
Forward mainnet P2P port 18761 only if you want inbound node peers. Do not forward RPC.
What port do I forward on my router?
faq.what_port_do_i_use.answer: Mainnet node P2P uses 18761. Main Pool stratum uses 5555. Nano Pool stratum uses 5556.
faq.what_port_do_i_use.question: What port do I use?
faq.where_do_i_get_support.answer: Use the official contact form and choose the section that matches your issue.
faq.where_do_i_get_support.question: Where do I get support?
faq.why_does_windows_warn_about_the_wall: New or unsigned wallet apps can trigger SmartScreen or reputation warnings. Only download from hobbyhashcoin.com and verify checksums when available.
Why does Windows warn about the wallet?
hero.lead: Frequently asked questions about HOBC nano miners, small SHA-256 miners, wallets, mining, nodes, ports, shares, security, and support.
hero.title: HobbyHash Coin FAQ
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about HobbyHash Coin.
meta.title: FAQ
